prompt: A Newton's cradle desk toy with a rectangular metal frame, two horizontal top rails, and five steel ball pendulums. Each ball hangs from a rigid V-shaped rod pair that pivots on a revolute joint at the top rail. Compact executive-desk scale.
label: Newton's cradle — five ball pendulums revolute at top rail

prompt: A carabiner spinner fidget keychain with a D-ring aluminum frame, a pivoting gate bar across the opening on a revolute hinge at the lower frame pin, and a spinning disc wheel mounted on a continuous revolute axle inside the upper loop. Keychain scale.
label: Carabiner spinner fidget — gate revolute disc continuous

prompt: A fidget spinner pen with a cylindrical barrel, a fixed front ballpoint tip, and two broad flat counterbalanced wing lobes extending symmetrically from the barrel center. The wing-lobe assembly spins freely as a continuous revolute joint about the barrel's long axis. Handheld pen scale.
label: Fidget spinner pen — two wing lobes continuous revolute barrel axis

prompt: An acupressure finger-massage ring with a smooth oval inner finger band and a spiked textured outer roller ring encircling it. The outer roller ring spins continuously about the ring's central axis on the inner band. Ring-sized wearable scale.
label: Acupressure massage ring — spiked outer roller continuous on inner band

prompt: A Wacky Tracks snap-and-click fidget with twelve trapezoidal plastic link segments joined sequentially by revolute hinge pins at the link ends, forming an open chain. Each segment connects to the next on a revolute joint about the transverse pin axis. Handheld open-chain scale.
label: Wacky Tracks — twelve trapezoidal links sequential revolute pins open chain

prompt: A seat-belt buckle clicker fidget with a rectangular buckle housing, a flat tongue plate that inserts into the housing slot, and a release push button on the housing top. The tongue slides prismatically into and out of the buckle slot. The release button depresses prismatically into the housing top. Compact handheld scale.
label: Seatbelt buckle clicker — tongue prismatic release button prismatic

prompt: A spinning-top fidget desk toy with a wide flat disc body, a rounded underside tapering to a blunt tip, and a short ribbed finger-grip stem at the top. The disc and stem spin continuously about the central vertical axis on the tip contact point. Small desktop scale.
label: Spinning top fidget — disc continuous vertical axis

prompt: A retractable ballpoint click pen with a cylindrical barrel, a flat pocket clip fixed to the side, a push-button plunger at the top cap, and a retractable tip at the nose. The push button moves prismatically into the barrel top. The ballpoint tip extends and retracts prismatically from the nose socket. Handheld pen scale.
label: Retractable click pen — push button prismatic tip prismatic

prompt: A handheld folding fan fidget with a flat rivet pivot at the handle end and eight narrow flat fan ribs extending from the pivot. Each rib rotates on a revolute joint about the shared pivot pin axis, spreading from fully closed to fully open. Small compact hand-fan scale.
label: Folding fan fidget — eight flat ribs shared pivot revolute

prompt: A miniature ratchet wrench fidget with a flat rectangular handle bar and a round ratchet head housing at one end. The ratchet head rotates continuously about the head joint axis in the advance direction. A pawl arm inside the housing engages the ring teeth on a small revolute pivot pin. Compact handheld scale.
label: Mini ratchet wrench fidget — ratchet head continuous pawl arm revolute

prompt: A quad-lobe fidget spinner with a central round bearing hub and four equal weighted arms extending outward at 90-degree spacing, each arm widening to a rounded rectangular tip. The full lobe assembly spins freely as a continuous revolute joint about the central hub axis between two flat outer cap discs. Handheld palm scale.
label: Quad-lobe fidget spinner — four equal arms continuous revolute central hub

prompt: A bi-wing fidget spinner with a central cylindrical bearing hub and two broad swept-back wing lobes extending symmetrically from the hub, each wing tapering to a rounded outer tip with a recessed weight pocket. The full wing assembly spins freely as a continuous revolute joint about the central hub axis between two flat cap plates. Handheld palm scale.
label: Bi-wing fidget spinner — two swept-back wings continuous revolute central hub
